scripts.build: esbuild src/game.js --bundle --format=esm --minify --outfile=game.js && esbuild src/style.css --minify --outfile=style.css && node -e "let h=require('fs').readFileSync('src/index.html','utf8'); require('fs').writeFileSync('index.html', h.replace('game.bundle.js','game.js'))"
scripts.dev: esbuild src/game.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=src/game.bundle.js && concurrently "esbuild src/game.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=src/game.bundle.js --watch" "npx live-server src --port=3000"
